content.scenarioHint: 在社交活动中，你刚认识一位新朋友，想通过询问对方的家乡或爱好来寻找共同兴趣，建立轻松联系
expectedAnswers: Hey, where are you from? I'm curious if we might have visited the same places!
Do you have any favorite hobbies? I'm always looking for new ones to try — maybe we share something!
What’s something you’re really passionate about? I love finding connections through shared interests.
Have you been to any cool cities lately? I’m obsessed with exploring new food spots — maybe you’ve been to one I know!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否成功引导对方分享个人信息以寻找共同点
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：语气友好、口语化，符合真实社交场景
关键词覆盖：使用了如 'where are you from', 'hobbies', 'passionate about', 'shared interests' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: You’re into yoga? I’ve been doing it for five years!
content.speakerTextCn: 你喜欢瑜伽？我已经练了五年了！
expectedAnswers: No way! I just started last month — any tips?
Seriously? I’ve been looking for a good studio. Where do you go?
That’s awesome! I’ve been wanting to get back into it. Do you recommend online classes?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否建立共同兴趣并推动对话深入
语言准确性：是否使用正确的情感回应词（No way!/Seriously?）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化表达如 'looking for', 'get back into', 'any tips?'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'yoga', 'studio', 'classes', 'tips' 等场景关键词
